mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approvedAmount FROM project_fund_record WHERE del_flag = 0
AND create_time >= #{dto.startDate}
AND create_time <= CONCAT(#{dto.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS submitCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM project_achievement WHERE del_flag = 0
AND create_time >= #{dto.startDate}
AND create_time <= CONCAT(#{dto.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
